title: notholaena brachycaulis
intro: Notholaena brachycaulis, also known as Rock fern or Cliff fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The medicinal properties of Notholaena brachycaulis have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Notholaena brachycaulis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
